Name: Angel Feather
Description: Its nice, but not as good as the one I hopefully have right now.

Name: Antidote
Description: Bottle says "Snake B' Gone".  Glad we don't have that problem.

Name: Axe of Harming
Description: uwu

Name: Battle Axe
Description: Really hefty, really short, really not my thing.

Name: Black Book
Description: At least its not a white book.  Yikes this thing is dirty,

Name: Blade of Jusztina
Description: I feel a lot of love in this blade.  Strange.

Name: Blade of Ophelia
Description: I feel a lot of love in this blade.  Strange.

Name: Blessed Wind
Description: Isn't this just the Crissagrim?

Name: Blood Spell
Description: Feels like putting this one would cause blood loss.  Why would I wear that?

Name: Blood Wine
Description: I don't think the Cabaret owner would appreciate this.

Name: Bomb
Description: This thing is like three times bigger than the ones the goblins use...

Name: Brittle Arming Sword
Description: I feel like if I swung this thing it'd snap immediately.

Name: Broken Hilt
Description: It does seem to have a button on the side that says "ON" though.

Name: Broken Lance
Description: This blunt thing needs a lot of love.

Name: Cloth Bandage
Description: Sadly the Nurse Costume doesn't help me know how to use this.

Name: Coal
Description: Oh someone has been naughty~

Name: Corrupted Dagger
Description: The blade feels imbued with something...enticing.

Name: Corrupt Key
Description: L#FD@#reje9f2f023JFLF2-- ...uh, what was I saying?

Name: Crossbow
Description: Hefty, well made.  What's not to like?

Name: Crystal Lantern
Description: It hums with a light blue glow.

Name: Crystal Shard
Description: Seems much more fragile than my Portable Portal.

Name: Cursed Blade
Description: Is it a full moon right now?  No?  Then its terrible.

Name: Dark Greatsword
Description: Did they really name this because its dark?  I don't get it.

Name: Dark Rapier
Description: Hey, this is just painted!

Name: Dark Spell
Description: Just putting this on makes me feel in touch with the void.  Spooky.

Name: Dark Urn
Description: Just how were they able to contain 'dark' in an urn?  Weird!

Name: Deep Knowledge
Description: I mean, someone must feel stronger now, right?

Name: Double Crossbow
Description: Okay this is just silly, why would this make it any better?

Name: Dried Rat
Description: Gross, what kind of idiot would accept this as a gift?!

Name: Dusty Crystal Orb
Description: Wow, looks very mysterious.  And uh, dusty, yeah.

Name: Earth Elixir
Description: Tastes like dirt!

Name: Earth Talisman
Description: Seems like it requires another piece.

Name: Eggnog
Description: This smells vile.  Do they not know how to make eggnog??

Name: Elfen Bow
Description: Seems like any other bow save it feels lighter than most.

Name: Elfen Longsword
Description: Has interesting inscriptions in the hilt, but nothing more.

Name: Elfen Sword
Description: Has interesting inscriptions in the hilt, but nothing more.

Name: Enchanted Key
Description: Opens something, but definitely no door I'm aware of.

Name: Fairy Moss
Description: Maybe they say its healthy to eat it, but I sure as hell am not going to.

Name: Fire Spell
Description: Just putting this on makes me feel really warm...

Name: Fire Sword
Description: Oh it wasn't broken at all you just had to turn it on!

Name: Fishing Spear
Description: Seems like its gotten a lot of use.  Smells like the sea.

Name: Ghost Blade
Description: Its like I'm wielding nothing at all!

Name: Golden Khopesh
Description: Very ornamental, reminds me of the Chaos Witch.

Name: Golden Sickle
Description: Very ornamental, reminds me of the Chaos Witch.

Name: Halberd
Description: Pretty well made, seems like something a guard would use.

Name: Hammer of Cruelty
Description: Says "If Lost Return to Garrat".  Who the hell is that?

Name: Health ViaI
Description: Hey this is just someone's bath water!  Gross!

Name: Health Vial
Description: While I could drink this, nothing beats a Peachy Peach.

Name: Heritage Sword
Description: Strangely, reminds me of beginnings...  Wonder why.

Name: Holy Water
Description: I remember a priest trying to douse me with this.  That was funny.

Name: Ice Sickle
Description: Is this made of ice?  Is that the joke?

Name: Ice Spell
Description: Just putting this on makes me feel really cool.  Not like that...

Name: Iron Claw
Description: Seems really beat up.  Wouldn't be caught using this sort of thing.

Name: Iron Club
Description: Isn't this just a bat?

Name: Iron Torch
Description: The accents make the flame burn brighter.  Totally!

Name: Jailor's Candle
Description: Not only is it a nice candle it also shoots fire.  Two in one!

Name: Jotunn Slayer
Description: It feels kind of sad holding this.  What's it even for?

Name: Key
Description: Certainly opens a door.  Not any door I'm aware of.

Name: Light Spell
Description: Just putting this on makes my life feel just a little brighter.

Name: Light Urn
Description: Just how were they able to contain 'light' in an urn?  Weird!

Name: Limbo
Description: Seems made by some sort of twisted alchemy.  How strange!

Name: Lucid Blade
Description: A sword radiating power to defeat curses.  Someone must've lost it!

Name: Lucky Bangle
Description: Looks cute, but seems to have no purpose in this world.  What's a level?

Name: Lyrian Greatsword
Description: A sword made for vampires.  Really long!

Name: Lyrian Longsword
Description: A sword made for vampires.  Feels bad in the hand, for me anyway.

Name: Mana Vial
Description: I could drink this to recharge my mana, but I could just hit stuff!

Name: Marauder Black Flail
Description: Wouldn't this suck to swing?  Imagine if the balls hit each other...

Name: Material
Description: Whatever this is, maybe it could be used in a witch's cauldron?

Name: Moonlight
Description: A blade that's lighter than it looks.  Its pretty bright!

Name: Moonlight Vial
Description: What is this weird substance in here?  Makes me feel...lucid.

Name: Normal Spell
Description: Just putting this on make me feel like a normie.  Eugh.

Name: Obsidian Cursebrand
Description: This thing has curves.  And its sharp!  Ouch!

Name: Obsidian Poisonguard
Description: Hefty shield with a spider on it.  Wish I could block sometimes...

Name: Obsidian Seal
Description: Its just a really sharp obsidian rock.  And yet...

Name: Ocean Elixir
Description: Tastes like the ocean!  And by that I mean its really salty!

Name: Oil Lantern
Description: It hums with a dim flame.  Has a lot of oil in it too!

Name: Patchouli
Description: You hear the giggling of a woman of the forest.  And then it vanishes.

Name: Pink Shrimp
Description: Tastes so real!  Maybe too real.  What the heck?

Name: Poison Claw
Description: Claw so good they dipped it in poison!  Keep it away from me.

Name: Poison Spell
Description: Just putting this on makes me feel sick.  Eugh.

Name: Poison Throwing Knife
Description: Would really hurt if someone threw this at someone.

Name: Poison Urn
Description: Just how were they able to contain 'poison' in an urn?  Oh wait.

Name: Privateer Musket
Description: What a gun.  I'm sure it never misses ever!  Haha...

Name: Progressive Vampiric Symbol
Description: A symbol of some faraway kingdom.  Lyria?  Never heard of it.

Name: Rapier
Description: Light in the hand, and very pointy.

Name: Replica Sword
Description: Okay but what is it a replica of?  Its in rough shape.

Name: Ritual Dagger
Description: What kind of dagger is this?  Feels so flimsy.

Name: Rusted Sword
Description: Maybe a few swings of this thing and actual care it would look nicer.

Name: Serpent Fang
Description: A cultist was asking for this.  I forget where.  Why can't I remember?

Name: Shadow Blade
Description: Wielding this th- the hell I can't see while holding it!

Name: Shining Blade
Description: Who needs a flashlight when you have this thing?

Name: Silver
Description: Wow some loose ch- the hell is this currency, I can't use this!

Name: Silver Rapier
Description: Blade made of silver.  Used by unsavory types I expect.

Name: Skeletal Rattle
Description: What kind of baby would like this sort of thing?

Name: Skeletal Axe
Description: Seems to be made of bone.  What kind of bone?  Can't say.

Name: Skeleton Egg
Description: Some sort of thing is inside.  I'd give it I dunno, a month?

Name: Skull of Josiah
Description: Poor soul, hopefully someone will take care of it.

Name: Soul Candy
Description: Trick or treat, smell my- you know what, nevermind.

Name: Spectral Candle
Description: Lighting it keeps bad vibes away.  Or so someone told me.

Name: Staff of Osiris
Description: Charged with magical energy, one use.  For what I can't say.

Name: Steel Claw
Description: Definitely used by unsavory folks I'd never want to meet.

Name: Steel Lance
Description: Something useful for horseback combat, not on foot.  Unless...

Name: Steel Needle
Description: Its like a rapier, but no protection.  No no like that...

Name: Steel Spear
Description: Don't the guards use this?

Name: Stone Club
Description: A bat?  Its a stone, you didn't make it.

Name: Strange Coin
Description: Did I just do something horrible by getting this?

Name: Sucsarian Dagger
Description: You'd have to be some sort of lizardfolk to use this.

Name: Sucsarian Spear
Description: You'd have to be some sort of lizardfolk to use this.

Name: Survey Banner
Description: So sturdy, it could hold up a crushing ceiling!

Name: Terminus Prison Key
Description: A key to some prison faraway.  Are there even prisons around here?

Name: Thorn
Description: A crow woman's blade.  She's probably attached to it.

Name: Throwing Knife
Description: Would really hurt if someone threw this at someone.

Name: Torch
Description: Standard issue torch.  Just like mom made back home.

Name: Twisted Staff
Description: A magically enhanced staff emitting light.  Beatrice might like it.

Name: Vampire Hunter Sword
Description: For a sword that kills vampires its certainly decorative.

Name: VHS Tape
Description: Oh no did that tape get leaked?  Oh wait this isn't it, that's good.

Name: Wand of Power
Description: Is this a wand or just a mess?

Name: Water Talisman
Description: Seems like it requires another piece.

Name: White VHS Tape
Description: Oh no did that tape get leaked?  Oh wait this isn't it, that's good.

Name: Wisp Heart
Description: Seems like some life force is inside of it.

Name: Wolfram Greatsword
Description: Whoever could actually use this is a Wolfram Alpha in my book.

Name: Wooden Shield
Description: Pretty plain shield.  I wish I could block sometimes...
